name: tailnet_status
description: Report the state of the local tailnet: this node plus all peers with hostname, MagicDNS name, Tailscale IPv4/IPv6, OS, online flag, last seen, exit-node flags, and tags.

onlineOnly.description: Only include peers that are currently online (default: false)

name: generate_ssh_config
description: Generate ssh-config Host blocks for tailnet nodes (MagicDNS name preferred, Tailscale IP fallback). Dry-run by default; write=true writes ~/.ssh/tailscale_dev_config; target="user_ssh_config" edits ~/.ssh/config idempotently between managed markers.

write.description: Actually write the config (default: false = dry-run, text only)

target.description: Write target: dedicated_file (default) or user_ssh_config (managed markers)

onlineOnly.description: Only include peers that are currently online (default: false)

user.description: Remote user to set on every Host block
